fields.helpText: Since the SAGG PROJECT file is identified uniquely with the site at which it is installed, this field will only accept one entry.
This field will contain the name of the Volume Set (for DSM only) where the temporary collection global (^XTMP) is located at this site.   If this is an Cache site, leave BLANK.

This field will contain the name of the UCI (for DSM only) where the temporary collection global (^XTMP) is located at this site.  If left BLANK, the collection software will default to the value of the first data piece in the ^%ZOSF("PROD") global node.   If this is an Cache site, leave BLANK.
This multiple field contains the Volume Sets (DSM) or Directories (Cache) that will be monitored by SAGG.
